positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed neo-art deco illustration featuring interconnected elements of celestial bodies and bioluminescent flora. The central composition should depict a stylized moon surrounded by stylized geometric constellations and exotic, blooming alien flowers. Use strong silhouette contrast against a deep midnight blue and teal background. The style must be a blend of clean vector illustration, ornamental etching, and vivid glowing line art. Focus on symmetrical balance and complex, repeating patterns suitable for a textile print. Isolated on a plain background for maximum graphic impact.
negative: photorealistic, blur, noisy, grain, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, abstract, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, jpeg artifacts, dull colors, gradients (too much)
